description.p: termcraft is a 2D sandbox survival game that runs entirely in the terminal, written in Rust. It follows the classic early-2012 block-survival gameplay loop: mine, craft, explore, and survive.

ul.li: Procedural Overworld, Nether, and End dimension generation
Mining, placement, inventory, crafting, furnaces, and brewing
Health, hunger, combat, weather, and fluid simulation
Passive and hostile mobs including creepers, skeletons, and the Ender Dragon
Villages, dungeons, strongholds, and Nether fortresses

description.p: termcraft is an unofficial fan project and is not affiliated with Mojang or Microsoft.
